etymology.description: semantic 亻(亻) (rén, "person") + phonetic 共(共) (gòng) -> to provide
etymology.interpretation: The character 供(gòng, "to provide") combines the semantic element 亻(亻) (rén, "person"), indicating an action performed by people, with the phonetic element 共(共) (gòng), which contributes its sound. This phono-semantic composition logically leads to the meaning "to provide," as it suggests a person engaged in the act of supplying or offering something.

examples.chinese: 他们为灾区提供食物和水(他們為災區提供食物和水)。
examples.pinyin: Tāmen wèi zāiqū tígōng shíwù hé shuǐ.
examples.english: They provide food and water for the disaster area.

examples.chinese: 企业需要为员工提供更好的福利(企業需要為員工提供更好的福利)。
examples.pinyin: Qǐyè xūyào wèi yuángōng tígōng gèng hǎo de fúlì.
examples.english: Companies need to provide better benefits for their employees.

examples.chinese: 这个图书馆为学生提供免费书籍(這個圖書館為學生提供免費書籍)。
examples.pinyin: Zhège túshūguǎn wèi xuéshēng tígōng miǎnfèi shūjí.
examples.english: This library provides free books for students.
